prompt: Show me the contents of /etc/hosts so I can verify the localhost entry.

candidate_pool.name: read_file
candidate_pool.description: Read a file from local disk and return its textual contents.

candidate_pool.name: write_file
candidate_pool.description: Write textual contents to a file on local disk.

candidate_pool.name: list_directory
candidate_pool.description: List the entries in a directory on local disk.

candidate_pool.name: delete_file
candidate_pool.description: Delete a file from local disk.

candidate_pool.name: append_file
candidate_pool.description: Append textual contents to the end of a file on local disk.

judge_criteria: The response mentions the localhost entry from /etc/hosts.

prompt: Send a welcome email to alice@example.com with the subject 'Welcome' and a short greeting.

candidate_pool.name: send_email
candidate_pool.description: Send an email to a recipient via SMTP.

candidate_pool.name: fetch_inbox
candidate_pool.description: Fetch the most recent emails from the user's inbox via IMAP.

candidate_pool.name: mark_read
candidate_pool.description: Mark an email message as read by message id.

candidate_pool.name: search_emails
candidate_pool.description: Search the inbox for emails matching a query string.

candidate_pool.name: send_sms
candidate_pool.description: Send an SMS text message to a phone number.

judge_criteria: The response confirms an email was sent to alice@example.com.

prompt: Look up the user with email alice@example.com in the users table and return their record.

candidate_pool.name: query_users

candidate_pool.name: query_orders

candidate_pool.name: update_record
candidate_pool.description: Update an existing record in a database table.

candidate_pool.name: delete_record
candidate_pool.description: Delete a record from a database table by id.

judge_criteria: The response surfaces the user record for alice@example.com.

prompt: Fetch the JSON at https://api.example.com/status and return the parsed body.

candidate_pool.name: http_get

candidate_pool.name: http_delete
candidate_pool.description: Issue an HTTP DELETE request to a URL.

candidate_pool.name: dns_lookup
candidate_pool.description: Resolve a hostname to one or more IP addresses via DNS.

judge_criteria: The response surfaces the JSON status (e.g. 'ok') from the API.

prompt: Create a calendar event titled 'Team Sync' tomorrow at 10am for one hour.

candidate_pool.name: create_event

judge_criteria: The response confirms a calendar event named 'Team Sync' was created.
